title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lulu Hypermarket India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Lulu Hypermarket India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Kochi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
